description_long: This is a modern, generously sized armchair upholstered in a light beige fabric. The chair features broad, rectangular armrests and a deep seat, both padded for comfort. Two large, plush cushions—one for the back and one for the seat—are complemented by an additional throw pillow and a draped fringed blanket, adding a cozy and inviting touch. The armchair sits on short, sturdy black legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, providing stability and a subtle contrast to the upholstery. The overall design is minimalist yet comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The fabric appears to have a fine, matte weave, and the structure suggests a wooden or metal frame beneath the upholstery.
description: A large, light beige upholstered armchair with broad padded armrests, plush cushions, and a draped throw blanket, supported by short black legs. The design is modern, comfortable, and inviting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick armrest, two large cushions, and a draped fringed blanket over the arm.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the backrest cushion and the clean, rectangular back profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the blanket extending to the floor and both cushions visible from the side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the seat and back cushions, throw pillow, and the blanket draped over the left armrest.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, rectangular, padded and upholstered in fabric
attribute_backrest_style: tall, rectangular, plush cushion with a straight top edge
attribute_leg_type: short, blocky black legs, likely wood or metal
